fields.name: title
fields.label: Title
fields.description: Project title. Also used for meta title and OpenGraph tags.

fields.name: description
fields.label: Description
fields.description: Project description. Also used for meta description and OpenGraph tags.

fields.name: image
fields.label: Featured Image
fields.description: Main project image. Also used as OpenGraph image for social sharing.

fields.name: mediaEmbed
fields.label: Media Embed URL
fields.description: Full embed URL for Vimeo, YouTube, or SoundCloud (e.g., https://w.soundcloud.com/player/?url=...)

fields.name: dateCompleted
fields.label: Date Completed
fields.description: Date the project was completed. Only the year will be displayed on the page.

fields.name: featuredProjects
fields.label: Featured Projects
fields.description: Drag to reorder featured projects for the homepage

fields.name: categoryOrder
fields.label: Sidebar Category Order
fields.description: Drag to reorder categories in the sidebar navigation

fields.name: title
fields.label: Title
fields.description: Used for page title and meta tags only. Does not appear in page content.

fields.name: description
fields.label: Description
fields.description: Used for meta description tag only. Does not appear in page content.

description.value: References another document, used as a foreign key
